rationale.fidelity: Correctly preserves pre-window zone slot limits, uncertain arrivals and service times, courier capacity, overtime, and the stated objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the operator, deadline, trade-off, mechanism, and feasible alternative concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Bounds the claim and rejects loyalty effects, but provides no traceable literature relationship.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels the loyalty claim unsupported and identifies calibration and deployment limits.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and well structured, with slight repetition across sections.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful and evidence-disciplined framing with only limited scholarly positioning.
